arts.ttl: Saturday's Eredivisie predictions including RKC Waalwijk vs. Feyenoord
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Eredivisie fixtures, including RKC Waalwijk vs. Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord injury woes: Lotomba breaks leg, Carranza out until 2025
arts.sum: Feyenoord reveal lengthy absences for Jordan Lotomba and Julian Carranza. The Swiss broke his leg in training while Carranza has calf issues.

Feyenoord's most recent league match ended in a 1-1 draw against Fortuna Sittard at Stadion Feijenoord, which extended their unbeaten streak to four matches. This result leaves Fortuna Sittard in four...

arts.ttl: Tribute to De Kuip Tunnel: Feyenoord 24-25 Fourth Kit Released
arts.sum: Feyenoord have launched their 24-25 fourth Feyenoord's 2024-25 fourth kit with a design that pays homage to the iconic De Kuip players' tunnel.
